response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and cloud-related technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, Kubernetes), but lacks direct experience with C++ at scale, which is a core requirement for this role. His leadership and mentorship experience is demonstrated through workshops and team contributions, but not in a formal cloud architecture or DevOps leadership capacity. His background in web and mobile development, while impressive, does not strongly align with the compute infrastructure focus of the role.
strengths: Proven leadership and mentorship through workshops, courses, and team contributions
Experience with distributed systems and scalable architectures (e.g., microservices at Dunnhumby)
Strong technical foundation with diverse languages and technologies, including cloud-related tools (AWS, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ at scale, which is critical for this role
No explicit production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs
Lacks formal technical leadership in cloud/DevOps engineering, which is preferred for this position
